templates.name: I can't remove the delivery guarantee from my cart
templates.content: The delivery guarantee can easily be toggled off in the cart and is not required. Let me know how that goes!

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: The best way to discuss wholesale is to email us directly at questions@nuts-n-more.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: I can check if that's possible. What's the order number, email address and the change you'd like to make?

templates.name: Brand ambassador / sponsorship
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! You can sign up for our affiliate program here: https://affiliate.nuts-n-more.com/

templates.name: Military / First responder / Healthcare / Teacher discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! We don't have any specific discounts like that, but our deals will always be shared with our SMS subscribers or on our website, so keep an eye out!

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: We don't offer phone support right now but I'd be happy to help you over text, let me know what I can do for you!

templates.name: Social Media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/nutsnmore/ and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/NutsNMore/

templates.name: Second time buyer wants a discount
templates.content: Glad to have you shopping with us again! You can sign up for the Nut Club: https://nuts-n-more.com/pages/the-nut-club which will give you 20% off of every purchase.

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at questions@nuts-n-more.com. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here - https://nuts-n-more.com/pages/return-policy

templates.name: Shipping info
templates.content: Processing takes up to 48 business hours (or even less) and we ship via USPS. Once shipped, it will take 2-7 business days domestically.

templates.name: How often will I get my subscription can I change it?
templates.content: You're able to update the frequency and quantities in your subscription at any time, so if you end up eating it faster or slower than expected, it won't be an issue!

templates.name: Can I microwave your spreads to have a sauce consistency?
templates.content: We actually don't advise microwaving them, as the high protein content tends to cook and actually turn into a muffin like texture. If you're looking for a spread you can use to drizzle, most of our spreads are pretty 'drizzle-able' once you stir them up good, except the cookie dough which is meant to be a little firmer to be like actual cookie dough.

templates.name: Will you be restocking the Banana Nut?
templates.content: Great question! The banana nut was a limited edition flavor, and since it ran out recently, we don't have any plans of restocking it this year. We may in the future but no set restock date set yet.

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We offer free shipping on domestic orders over $35. Maybe you can add something else to reach the min?

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: You can find us at a store near you here: https://nuts-n-more.com/pages/store-locator

templates.name: Restock (Edit when needed)
templates.content: I'll be more than happy to check on this with my team for you! Can you please tell me which item are you interested in specifically?

templates.name: Do you have samples? (Only send if first time buyer)
templates.content: Yes, we now offer samples, for first time customers only! https://nuts-n-more.com/pages/nuts-n-more-sample-offer
